denial.description: Present only when the tool call was denied by policy

categories.filesystem: File system read/write operations within the project root
categories.process: Shell command and test execution with sandbox enforcement
categories.web: Web search and fetch with cache and safety labels
categories.memory: Chronicle memory store and query for project-scoped facts
categories.coordination: Workspace coordination locks for concurrent access
categories.knowledge-graph: Knowledge graph code intelligence (call paths, impact analysis, architecture)

tools.name: directory_list
tools.description: List files and directories inside the active project root.

required.name: path
required.description: Project-relative or /project/... path to list

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read a file inside the active project root.

required.name: path
required.description: Project-relative or /project/... path to the file

tools.name: file_write
tools.description: Write a file inside the active project root, subject to locks and runtime mode. Shadow-written in dry-run.

required.name: path
required.description: Project-relative or /project/... path to write

required.name: content
required.description: Full file content to write

examples.content: export function add(a: number, b: number): number { return a + b; }

tools.name: file_delete
tools.description: Delete a file inside the active project root (soft-delete to .babel-trash/).

required.name: path
required.description: Project-relative path to delete

tools.name: shell_exec
tools.description: Execute an allowlisted shell command inside the active project root. Mocked in dry-run. Subject to command allowlist (35 commands), shell operator blocking, and path traversal prevention.

required.name: command
required.description: Shell command (no cmd /c prefix, no cd). Must use allowlisted commands only.

optional.name: working_directory
optional.description: Project-relative working directory for the command

tools.name: test_run
tools.description: Run an allowlisted test command with a longer default timeout (300s). Same sandbox rules as shell_exec.

required.name: command
required.description: Test command (no cmd /c prefix). Must use allowlisted commands.

tools.name: mcp_request
tools.description: Send a read-oriented JSON-RPC request to a configured MCP server. Live even in dry-run (read-only).

required.name: server
required.description: Name of the configured MCP server

required.name: query
required.description: Query or tool name to invoke on the MCP server

tools.name: mcp_resource_list
tools.description: List resources exposed by a configured MCP server. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: server
required.description: Name of the configured MCP server

tools.name: mcp_resource_read
tools.description: Read a resource exposed by a configured MCP server. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: server
required.description: Name of the configured MCP server

required.name: uri
required.description: Resource URI to read

tools.name: mcp_prompt_list
tools.description: List prompts exposed by a configured MCP server. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: server
required.description: Name of the configured MCP server

tools.name: mcp_prompt_get
tools.description: Fetch a prompt from a configured MCP server by name. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: server
required.description: Name of the configured MCP server

required.name: name
required.description: Name of the prompt to fetch

optional.name: arguments
optional.description: Optional arguments for the prompt template

tools.name: mcp_tool_search
tools.description: Search tools exposed by a configured MCP server. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: server
required.description: Name of the configured MCP server

optional.name: query
optional.description: Optional search query to filter tools

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web with cache and public-network safeguards. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: query
required.description: Search query string

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a public web URL with cache and content safety labels. Read-only, live in dry-run. HTTP upgraded to HTTPS.

required.name: url
required.description: Public HTTPS URL to fetch

tools.name: plugin_tool
tools.description: Invoke an active read-only plugin tool. Live in dry-run.

required.name: plugin
required.description: Plugin identifier

required.name: name
required.description: Name of the tool within the plugin

optional.name: arguments
optional.description: Optional arguments for the plugin tool

tools.name: audit_ui
tools.description: Run the UI audit helper against a URL for a Babel run. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: url
required.description: URL to audit

required.name: run_id
required.description: Babel run ID for evidence tracking

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store a project-scoped Chronicle memory fact. Mocked in dry-run.

required.name: key
required.description: Memory key (unique identifier for the fact)

required.name: value
required.description: Memory value (the fact content to store)

examples.value: 1. Run tests 2. Build 3. Deploy to staging

tools.name: memory_query
tools.description: Query a project-scoped Chronicle memory fact by key, or list ALL facts. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: key
required.description: Memory key to query, or 'ALL' to list all facts

tools.name: enter_plan_mode
tools.description: Switch the local executor runtime into plan mode. Mutating tools are restricted in plan mode. Stateful in dry-run.

tools.name: exit_plan_mode
tools.description: Switch the local executor runtime into act mode, re-enabling mutating tools. Stateful in dry-run.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search the local semantic index for relevant indexed context. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: query
required.description: Semantic search query

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search text files under the active project root for a regex pattern. Read-only, live in dry-run. Respects approved read roots.

required.name: pattern
required.description: Regular expression pattern to search for

optional.name: path
optional.description: Subdirectory or file path to restrict search to

optional.name: max_matches
optional.description: Maximum number of matches to return

tools.name: glob
tools.description: List project-relative file paths that match a bounded glob pattern. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: pattern
required.description: Glob pattern (e.g., 'src/**/*.ts', '**/*.test.*')

optional.name: max_paths
optional.description: Maximum number of paths to return

tools.name: workspace_symbol_search
tools.description: Search project code files for symbol definitions matching a query. Read-only, live in dry-run.

required.name: query
required.description: Symbol name or partial name to search for

optional.name: max_matches
optional.description: Maximum number of symbol matches to return

tools.name: get_code_outline
tools.description: Reads a code file and returns a list of its classes, functions, methods, and interfaces with their line numbers. Read-only.

required.name: path
required.description: Absolute path to the file to outline

tools.name: find_code_definition
tools.description: Search the codebase for the declaration and full body/block of a code symbol (class, function, interface, method). Read-only.

required.name: symbol
required.description: Name of the symbol definition to find

tools.name: find_code_references
tools.description: Locate references and usage occurrences of a symbol across codebase code files, excluding its definition. Read-only.

required.name: symbol
required.description: Name of the symbol references to search for

tools.name: load_skill_manifest
tools.description: Retrieve the complete detailed instruction manual and system rules for a specific technical skill from the prompt catalog.

required.name: skill_id
required.description: Catalog ID of the skill to load (e.g. skill_ts_zod)

tools.name: workspace_map
tools.description: Get a recursive directory tree of the workspace, respecting .gitignore. Read-only, live in dry-run.

optional.name: max_files
optional.description: Maximum number of files to include

tools.name: git_context
tools.description: Show git status, diff, and uncommitted changes for the current repo. Non-mutating. Read-only, live in dry-run.

optional.name: path
optional.description: Restrict to a specific path within the repo

tools.name: git_reset
tools.description: Reset git state (working tree, index, or specific ref).

optional.name: hard
optional.description: Perform a hard reset if true

tools.name: git_push
tools.description: Push commits to a remote repository.

tools.name: acquire_lock
tools.description: Acquire a workspace coordination lock for a path. Used for multi-agent concurrency control. Stateful in dry-run.

required.name: path
required.description: Path to lock within the workspace

required.name: reason
required.description: Human-readable reason for acquiring the lock

optional.name: ttl_sec
optional.description: Time-to-live in seconds before automatic release

tools.name: release_lock
tools.description: Release a workspace coordination lock for a path. Stateful in dry-run.

required.name: path
required.description: Path to unlock within the workspace

tools.name: tool_catalog
tools.description: List all available executor tools with their input contracts, descriptions, and policy metadata. Read-only, live in dry-run. Supports optional category and mutating filters.

optional.name: category
optional.description: Filter by tool category (filesystem, process, mcp, web, plugin, ui, memory, mode, search, coordination)

optional.name: mutating
optional.description: Filter: true = mutating only, false = read-only only

tools.name: kg_trace_path
tools.description: Trace call paths for a symbol in the knowledge graph (inbound, outbound, or both). Shows callers and callees with file locations.

required.name: symbol
required.description: Symbol name to trace (function, method, class)

optional.name: direction
optional.description: Call direction: inbound (callers), outbound (callees), or both (default: both)

tools.name: kg_search_graph
tools.description: Search the knowledge graph for code symbols matching a query by name, kind, or pattern.

required.name: query
required.description: Search query for symbol name or pattern

optional.name: kind
optional.description: Filter by symbol kind (function, class, method, interface, etc.)

optional.name: limit
optional.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: kg_impact_analysis
tools.description: Analyze the impact of changes to files or symbols with risk classification (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). Returns affected callers and callees grouped by hop distance.

optional.name: files
optional.description: Files to analyze for change impact

optional.name: symbol
optional.description: Symbol to analyze for change impact

optional.name: depth
optional.description: Maximum hop depth for impact traversal

tools.name: kg_architecture
tools.description: Get a high-level architecture overview of the codebase: language breakdown, hotspot functions, and package structure.

optional.name: scope
optional.description: Scope of analysis (directory path or module)

tools.name: kg_index_status
tools.description: Check whether the knowledge graph has been indexed and is ready for structural queries. Returns node/edge counts when indexed.
